results.description: 4-channel ICU monitor: HR, BP, SpO2, respiration
5-stream climate data: temp×3, CO2, sea level

violations.message: Information loss ≈ 1.4 bits (30 audio steps for 80 data levels)

loudness.note: Near-miss to Weber's law at low levels (Jesteadt correction applied)

baseline_vs_sonitype.note: SoniType guarantees zero violations for well-typed specs by construction

methodology.type_system: Perceptual refinement types with JND-based qualifiers (§4 of paper)
methodology.jnd_models: Wier et al. (1977) pitch, Jesteadt et al. (1977) loudness, Friberg & Sundberg (1995) duration, Grey (1977) timbre
methodology.d_prime: Compound d' via perceptual independence: d' = √Σ margin²_i
methodology.information_loss: Channel capacity in bits: log₂(JND-separated steps)
methodology.baseline: Naive 8-bit uniform quantization without perceptual awareness
